feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DRC VAT Reporting: Supporting Documents/Attachments in USt-VA Submission
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the submission of VAT Advance Returns (USt-VA) via Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

Is it possible to include attachments (e.g., additional documents or explanations) directly from the system when submitting the VAT advance return electronically?
The background is that supporting documents should be sent along with the submission so that the tax authority does not need to request them separately. I would like to carry out the entire process in the Run Statutory Reports app.

If so:

  • Which configuration or process is required to enable this?
  • Are there any limitations depending on the country or interface (e.g., ELSTER)?
  • Is this supported as standard, or does it require an enhancement?

Thank you in advance for your insights and experience.

Best regards,
Vanessa

entry.title: DRC (S/4HANA Private Cloud): ZM Line Items Not Visible in “Run Statutory Reports” Preview
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

we are using Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud to submit statutory reports to the tax authorities.

In this context, the EC Sales List (ZM report) is generated using the Run Statutory Reports app. However, the ZM line items are not displayed in the preview. Interestingly, this issue does not occur in the Public Cloud.

What could be the reason for this, and what needs to be adjusted so that the items are visible in the preview?

The data itself is included in the XML file that is sent to the tax authorities.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Vanessa

#SAP #S4HANA #DRC #TaxReporting #VAT #ECsaleslist #PrivateCloud #RunStatutoryReports #SAPCommunity #ELSTER

entry.title: How to Identify On-Premise vs S/4HANA Private Cloud System from SAP Data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on a requirement where I am fetching system data from a remote SAP system (via RFC), and I need to identify whether the source system is On-Premise or SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

However, based on my analysis so far, most of the system properties (such as system version, technical details, etc.) appear to be very similar for both On-Premise and Private Cloud systems. Because of this, I am not able to clearly differentiate between the two.

Any guidance or pointers would be really helpful.

entry.title: J4D- S4H- RAP Code Generation - Service Interrupted
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While performing a demo on the RAP Code generation feature in J4D – S4H system, we got the Service Interrupted error after attempting multiple times. Also, kindly let us know how to view logs. 

Attached the screenshot for reference.

Regards,

Sahana

entry.title: S/4 HANA EAM - Maintenance order - Display PRT original document assigned to operation
entry.content:
Greetings,

we are looking for the easiest way to display original files assigned to document linked to maintenance order via production resources and tools (PRT). These PRTs can be linked directly to maintenance order operation or are linked to a task list operation (for preventive maintenance scenarios).  

We would like to offer our maintenance personel the option to review maintenance instructions before  or during exection of maintenance tasks.

So far we have tried the following:

  • Find maintenance orders and operations app - F2173
  • Perform maintenance jobs app - F5104A
  • GUI transactions - IW33, IW32, IW41, IW42, IW44, ....

In the examples we have tried there is no direct way to display the original - first we need to display the document info record (DIR) and from it open the original.  From Fiori apps there is even no direct link to DIR we have to copy paste DIR number to Manage documents app.

Additionaly we are looking for a way to display documents linked directly to maintenance order reference technical object (EQ or FL)  - similar to what is already available in GUI. 

Thank you for your help.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Transitioning into SAP Cloud (E_S4CPE path). Open to advice and connections.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m Neal — transitioning into the SAP ecosystem with a focus on cloud ERP and S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. I’m currently working through the learning journey (E_S4CPE) and building foundational skills. I’d love to connect with others here, learn from your experiences, and get real advice on how to grow in SAP operations. Thanks!

entry.title: Things to check after SAP servers are restored
entry.content: Due to current geo-political conditions, our servers and SAP production environment was disrupted. It will be restored in a few days. What should be our strategy after system is restored? How should we perform entries for all functional module transactions that were not made during this downtime? Is there any check-list that is recommended? How can we ensure that the system provided is ready for live transactions? Does this server disruption effect cross module integrations? Customizations? Please guide.

entry.title: Complete List of scop items in private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I want to get Complete List of scop items for private Cloud, is it possible to get them in consolidated way in excel?

Kind Regards,

ebsor

entry.title: SLED mandatory check ignored in Fiori App F1043 (Post Goods Receipt) - Works in MIGO (S/4 Private)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition and facing a discrepancy between GUI (MIGO) and Fiori (F1043) regarding the Shelf Life Expiration Date (SLED) mandatory check.

The Context: Our business requirement is to force users to enter the Expiration Date manually during Goods Receipt (101) without providing a Production Date.

  • Material Master (MARA): MHDHB (Total Shelf Life) = 0 / MHDRZ (Min. Rem. Shelf Life) = 1.

  • Configuration (V_159L): * Plant Check: Active.

    • Movement Type 101: Set to "1" (Enter Expiration Date).

The Issue:

  • In MIGO (GUI): Everything works perfectly. The system identifies the material is SLED-relevant (due to Min. Rem. Shelf Life > 0) and since Total Shelf Life is 0, it forces a manual entry of the Expiration Date.

  • In Fiori App (F1043): The field "Shelf Life Expiration Date" is NOT mandatory. Users can post the GR without any date, which bypasses our inventory controls.

In summary, how can I force the SLED to be mandatory in the Fiori "Post Goods Receipt" app when Total Shelf Life is 0, since it already works correctly in MIGO?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: ECS broke our RISE PCE WAF 2 and ECS cannot fix it
entry.content:
After 4 years in RISE PCE (Azure) we finally were requested by SAP to raise a ticket with ECS to migrate from WAF v1 to WAF v2.

it looks like ECS have hand crafted the configuration - its not via a defined terraform, bicep or arm template.  the WAF v2 rules are in restricted mode and nothing really works...

Fiori tiles won't work;  icon image are missing

ECS won't provide an export of the WAF config so we can compare and review - even though its our tenant and a shared security model.

you will have to forgive my ignorance in that as RISE PCE the WAF should have a defined security template that doesn't need any tweaking.

we already know SAP don't follow MS best practice for SAP on azure; or i would have had WAF v2 4 years ago.

Anyone got any suggestions i can bat back into ECS?

entry.title: Post REM Activities using RepetitiveMfgConfirmation API
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to post REM Activities specific times using the RepetitiveMfgConfirmation API or any other API?
It is possible to do it with the transaction MFBF, but I cannot find it in the API documentation.

Thank you

Regards

Julien

entry.title: Pressing the "Display JIT Calls" button in the VL03N gives me an empty list.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As the title suggests, I'm trying to figure out how to make the "Display JIT Calls" button work within transaction VL03N. When I press the button, I'm shown an empty list, even though I'm expecting data.

I followed the configuration suggested by SAP, but unfortunately, I've noticed some bugs, as I haven't had the same problem with other customers with different releases.

Thank you.

entry.title: FWTR056 Error During NDF Transaction Creation in FTR_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are encountering error FWTR056 while attempting to create an NDF transaction using transaction FTR_CREATE.

 

We have performed a detailed review of the configuration, including product type, transaction type, and all relevant customizing settings, and no inconsistencies were identified.

 

The issue occurs consistently during transaction creation.

 

For your analysis, we have attached:

• A detailed step-by-step document outlining how the error is reproduced

• Screenshots and configuration details related to the product and transaction setup

 

At this point, we suspect there may be a missing dependency, configuration inconsistency not visible at first level, or a system-related issue.

 

Could you please assist us in identifying the root cause of error FWTR056 and advise on the appropriate resolution?

 

If additional information is required, we will be happy to provide it.

 

Thank you for your support.

 

Best regards,


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Define Long Text Control for Order Types Configuration is missing
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for the reply for this url 

 

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: QM Inspection Lot with Segregated Responsibilities per Operation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m working on a QM setup in SAP S/4HANA and ran into a requirement I’m not sure how to handle in standard.

We’re using inspection lots with multiple operations in the Manage Inspection Lots app. The idea is pretty simple:

  • 1 inspection lot
  • 3 operations
  • Each operation has 1 qualitative characteristic (Yes/No)

What we’re trying to achieve is clear separation of responsibilities per operation.

So for example:

  • Operation 1 --> handled by Person A (Work Center A)
  • Operation 2 --> handled by Person B (Work Center B)
  • Operation 3 --> handled by Person C (Work Center C)

Each person should only be able to record results / confirm their own operation, not the others.

I’m trying to figure out:

  • Can this be controlled in standard (e.g. via work center, control key, or authorizations)?
  • Is there a common/best practice for this kind of segregation in QM?
  • Or would this require some kind of enhancement (BAdI, user-exit, Fiori adaptation)?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to fix Backend error in ISLM scenario: SD_INT_AI_GPT in Joule?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I ask Joule questions related to sales, it returns the error:
‘Backend error in ISLM scenario: SD_INT_AI_GPT. Check the intelligent scenario maintenance in transaction ISLM_CONN_MAP.’

When I then go into S/4HANA and run transaction ISLM_CONN_MAP, I see another error — ‘HTTP failure, processing failed, invalid state, invalid timeout, or others’ — when I click Check Connection.

 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue before, or have any suggestions on how to troubleshoot this?

(Some of my questions are: Has the goods of sales order 12345678 arrived? When was the sales order 12345678 created?)

(I am integrating Joule with S/4HANA PCE.)

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Joule SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: SAP GUI UPGRADE
entry.content:
We are planning to upgrade SAP GUI - windows 32.
could you provide the below details,
1.The latest SAP GUI version Available and its recommended Patch level?
2.Key advantages and improvements in the latest version?
3. Is there any known limitations or drawbacks?


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize which SAP Frontend Product you use
A: SAP GUI for Windows
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: SAP GUI Usability and settings


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Material Long Description for search help while creating PO
entry.content: Material Long Description is required While  using  search help in T-code :  ME21N. This is required while creating purchase order.

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2511 - MAIF Migration Program
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently in the process of migrating from SSAM 2405 to SSAM 2511 and are using the report /SMFND/CORE_MIGRATE_MAPP_CONFG to migrate the mobile application configuration.

We would appreciate your guidance on the following input parameters required by the program:

Source Application Pattern
Should this be the exact name of the existing (source) mobile application from SSAM 2405?
Or does it support wildcards/pattern-based selection (e.g., prefix-based)?
Target Application Pattern
Should this be the name of the new application in SSAM 2511?
Is it expected to already exist, or will the program create it during migration?
Source App Feature/Persona Prefix
What value should be provided here?
Is this meant to match existing feature/persona IDs (e.g., prefixes used in configuration tables), or is it used for transformation during migration?
Custom Objects Handling
Will the migration program also consider custom OMDOs and OData models created in the source application?
Are there any limitations or additional steps required to ensure custom configurations are migrated correctly?
Additionally, if there are any best practices or prerequisites (e.g., naming conventions, transport considerations, or known constraints) for running this migration program, please let us know.

I have reviewed the SAP documentation; however, some aspects are still unclear.

https://help.sap.com/docs/service-asset-manager/upgrading-sap-service-and-asset-manager/migrating-custom-configurations-to-newer-version-of-mobile-application?locale=en-US

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: SAP Fiori List report app does not load automatically when navigating back to app
entry.content:
In Adaptation project which is built on a Fiori list report app, the app data does not load automatically when navigated back to this application. User has to manually click on Go. There is a mandatory filter in app, which has data when app loads.

This was working in earlier versions, but stopped working after upgrading to S4HANA 2023.

We have tried various properties in manifest of main application to enable auto loading, but its not working. 

Can someone please provide possible solutions.
